items.title: Unit Tests
items.description: Unit tests cover units in isolation; integration tests cover what unit tests deliberately mocked out.

items.title: Fixtures & Mocks
items.description: Integration tests still use fixtures (for setup) but use *fewer* mocks — they want real dependencies.

items.title: Test Coverage
items.description: Integration coverage fills the wiring gaps unit-coverage tools can't see.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: Most teams run integration tests on every PR (nightly for slower smoke suites).

items.title: Containers & Dependency Management
items.description: Reproducible environments (Docker, testcontainers) are the substrate for stable integration tests.
